_comment: PCT-adjacent segments added BY HAND because they were never logged on Madison's Garmin inReach (e.g. trail crew work with the device off) OR because she walked a variant that runs too far off the official PCT line to snap/draw from the export (e.g. Eagle Creek). Keyed by the geojson role ('trailcrew', 'misc') or bucket key ('2023'). Each entry is a PCT mile range: bucket_coverage.py unions it into coverage; for the pct_segments.py roles it is also drawn as a slice of the real centerline (ids suffixed -mNN) and centerline.mjs widens its harvest bbox to include it. The '2023' key is coverage-only (year_track.py draws 2023 from the actual track, not this). Mile ranges + notes only - no dates, timestamps, or raw coordinates - so this stays privacy-clean and committable.

2023.note: Eagle Creek Alternate: left the official PCT ~mile 2130 and descended Eagle Creek Trail #440 (Tunnel Falls) to Cascade Locks / Bridge of the Gods, rejoining at ~mile 2147. Her continuous track runs up to ~3.9 km off the official ridge line, so it does not snap to coverage (0.5 km) - counted complete here. Its actual shape IS drawn: year_track.py keeps it via the Columbia Gorge CORRIDOR_BOXES exception.

trailcrew.note: Carson Pass corridor: from just south of Elephant's Back up through the pass to Meiss Meadow / Upper Truckee River. Trail crew work not captured on the inReach.
Castle Rock area (near Sierra City), ~mile 1238-1244. Trail crew work not captured on the inReach.
